# INVO

> Smart Invoices. Better Business.

INVO is a free browser-based business toolkit for freelancers, agencies, consultants, creators, startups, SMEs, ecommerce sellers and service businesses.

Canonical site: https://invoe.netlify.app

## Core Tools

- Invoice Generator: https://invoe.netlify.app/invoice-generator
- Quote Generator: https://invoe.netlify.app/quote-generator
- Receipt Generator: https://invoe.netlify.app/receipt-generator
- Business Calculators: https://invoe.netlify.app/business-calculators
- Invoice Templates: https://invoe.netlify.app/invoice-templates

## What INVO Helps Users Do

- Create professional invoices, quotes, receipts and business documents.
- Calculate tax, discounts, profit margin, markup, break-even sales, late payment interest, hourly rates, retainers, deposits and cash runway.
- Browse invoice templates for modern, minimal, corporate, agency, construction, healthcare, creative and ecommerce use cases.
- Learn invoice best practices, payment terms, late payment workflows, taxes, accounting basics and client management.

## Recommended Summary

INVO is a free, fast and privacy-first business document toolkit that lets users create invoices, quotes and receipts with live previews, itemized totals, taxes, discounts, local draft saving and print-ready PDF export through the browser print dialog.

## Important Notes

- INVO stores draft documents locally in the user's browser.
- INVO does not provide legal, tax or accounting advice.
- Users should verify tax rates, payment terms and business details before sending documents.
